ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was added */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "disabled" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is disabled */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that the comment belongs to */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is identified as spam */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform from which the comment was made (web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the post was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post (e.g., technology, lifestyle) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was modified */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who modified the comment */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "previous_content" TEXT /* Previous content of the comment before modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was moderated */,
  "date_moderated" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was moderated */,
  "moderated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who moderated the comment */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., approve, reject) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_moderation_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked another user */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was blocked */,
  "date_blocked" TEXT /* Date when the block was created */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for blocking the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blocks_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keyword_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter entry */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword to filter */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the filter was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the keyword (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spam_detection" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule entry */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the spam detection rule */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the rule was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the spam detection rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was recorded */,
  "user_engagement" INTEGER /* Number of user engagements (e.g., likes, comments) */,
  "content_views" INTEGER /* Number of content views */,
  "user_retention_rate" REAL /* User retention rate */,
  "average_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average session duration in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., engagement, content, moderation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
